channel.title: Helike Template - Jupiter WordPress Theme
channel.description: Another amazing template created by Jupiter WordPress theme

item.title: Hello world!
item.dc:creator: alex
item.content:encoded: Welcome to Jupiter Demos Sites. This is your first post. Edit or delete it, then start blogging!

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: cuneyt
item.content:encoded: [vc_row][vc_column css=".vc_custom_1448457042673{padding-right: 0px !important;padding-left: 0px !important;}"][vc_column_text][layerslider_vc id="1"][/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][mk_padding_divider size="25"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=".vc_custom_1448461225155{padding-right: 0px !important;padding-left: 0px letter_spacing="1" margin_bottom="0" font_family="none" align="right"]OUR SERVICES[/mk_fancy_title][mk_divider style="thin_solid" divider_width="custom_width" custom_width="34" align="right" thin_single_color="#fda600" thickness="4" margin_top="0"][vc_column_text align="right"]Maecenas enim diam euismod non pretium vel gravida nec leo donec semper metus auctor scelerisque sed est erat duis felis nec felis posuere tincidunt auctor risus hac habitasse platea dictumst curabitur dolor pharetra idin elit commodo tincidunt nunc proin feugiat consequat turpis vehicula urna sit amet phasellus lacinia tellus sit amet laoreet contetur[/vc_column_text][mk_button dimension="flat" url="#" align="right" margin_top="10" margin_bottom="0" bg_color="#433d60" btn_hover_bg="#fda600" btn_hover_txt_color="#ffffff"]ALL SERVICES[/mk_button][/mk_custom_box][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/3"][mk_padding_divider size="60" visibility="visible-sm"][mk_image src="http://demos.artbees.net/jupiter5/helike/wp-content/uploads/sites/72/2015/11/cargo.jpg" image_size="full" link="#" align="center" crop="false"][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" size="21" font_weight="bold" margin_top="13" margin_bottom="0" font_family="none"]CARGO[/mk_fancy_title][vc_column_text]Maecenas enim diam euismod non pretium vel gravida nec leo donec semper metus auctor scelerisque sed est erat duis felis nec niche...[/vc_column_text][mk_button dimension="flat" url="#" margin_bottom="0" btn_hover_bg="#433d60" btn_hover_txt_color="#ffffff"]READ MORE[/mk_button][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/3"][mk_padding_divider size="60" visibility="visible-sm"][mk_image src="http://demos.artbees.net/jupiter5/helike/wp-content/uploads/sites/72/2015/11/logistic.jpg" image_size="full" link="#" align="center" crop="false"][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" size="21" font_weight="bold" margin_top="13" margin_bottom="0" font_family="none"]LOGISTIC SERVICE[/mk_fancy_title][vc_column_text]Maecenas enim diam euismod non pretium vel gravida nec leo donec semper metus url(http://demos.artbees.net/jupiter5/helike/wp-content/uploads/sites/72/2015/11/why-we-offer-bg.jpg?id=256) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}"][vc_column][mk_padding_divider size="73"][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" size="31" font_weight="300" letter_spacing="2" margin_bottom="0" thickness="4" margin_top="0" margin_bottom="60"][vc_row_inner is_fullwidth_content="false"][vc_column_inner width="1/3"][mk_image src="http://demos.artbees.net/jupiter5/helike/wp-content/uploads/sites/72/2015/11/custom-icon-01.png" image_size="full" align="center" animation="bottom-to-top" crop="false"][mk_fancy_title align="center" animation="bottom-to-top"]Diam euismod non pretium vel gravida nec leo donec semper metus rebento...[/vc_column_text][mk_padding_divider size="60" visibility="visible-sm"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/3"][mk_image src="http://demos.artbees.net/jupiter5/helike/wp-content/uploads/sites/72/2015/11/custom-icon-02.png" image_size="full" animation="bottom-to-top"]FAST AIR FREIGHT[/mk_fancy_title][vc_column_text align="center" animation="bottom-to-top"]Diam euismod non pretium vel gravida nec leo donec semper metus rebento...[/vc_column_text][mk_padding_divider size="60" visibility="visible-sm"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/3"][mk_image src="http://demos.artbees.net/jupiter5/helike/wp-content/uploads/sites/72/2015/11/custom-icon-03.png" image_size="full" align="center" animation="bottom-to-top" crop="false"][mk_fancy_title align="center" animation="bottom-to-top"]Diam euismod non pretium vel gravida nec leo donec semper metus rebento...[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][mk_padding_divider size="54"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][mk_padding_divider size="60"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width="2/3"][mk_gallery images="229,230,231,232,233" style="style2" height="400" overlay_color="#433d60" item_spacing="5"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/3"][mk_custom_box padding_vertical="23" padding_horizental="23" margin_bottom="0" bg_color="#f6f5f6"][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" size="31" font_weight="300" letter_spacing="1" font_family="none"]OUR FLEET[/mk_fancy_title][mk_divider style="thin_solid" divider_width="custom_width" custom_width="34" align="left" thin_single_color="#fda600" thickness="4" margin_top="0"][vc_column_text]Maecenas enim diam euismod pretium vel gravida nec leo donec semper metus auctor scele risque sed erat duis felis felis posuere tincidunt auctor risus habitasse platea dictumst curabitur dolor pharetra idin elit commodo tincidunt nunc proin feugiat coat turpis...[/vc_column_text][mk_button dimension="flat" url="#" margin_top="10" margin_bottom="0" bg_color="#433d60" btn_hover_bg="#fda600" btn_hover_txt_color="#ffffff"]ALL SERVICES[/mk_button][/mk_custom_box][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][mk_padding_divider size="60"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" size="31" font_weight="300" letter_spacing="1" margin_bottom="0" font_family="none" align="center"]GLOBAL PARTNERS[/mk_fancy_title][mk_divider style="thin_solid" divider_width="custom_width" custom_width="34" item.title: About Us
item.dc:creator: cuneyt
item.content:encoded: [vc_row animation="bottom-to-top" css=".vc_custom_1452158192859{padding-top: 140px !important;padding-bottom: 10px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;background-image: url(http://demos.artbees.net/jupiter5/helike/wp-content/uploads/sites/72/2015/11/about-us-bg.jpg?id=270) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}"][vc_column][mk_title_box color="#433d60" highlight_color="#ffffff" highlight_opacity="1" size="60" font_weight="300" letter_spacing="2" font_family="none" animation="bottom-to-top"]ABOUT US[/mk_title_box][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][mk_padding_divider size="55"][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" size="31" font_weight="300" txt_transform="uppercase" letter_spacing="2" margin_bottom="0" font_family="none"]history[/mk_fancy_title][mk_divider style="thin_solid" divider_width="custom_width" custom_width="34" align="left" thin_single_color="#fda600" thickness="4" margin_top="0"][vc_column_text]Maecenas enim diam euismod non pretium vel gravida nec leo donec semper metus auctor scelerisque sed est erat duis felis nec felis posuere tincidunt auctor risus hac habitasse platea dictumst curabitur dolor pharetra idin elit commodo tincidunt nunc proin feugiat consequat turpis vehicula urna sit amet phasellus lacinia tellus sit amet laoreet contetur felis posuere tincidunt auctor risus hac habitasse platea dictumst curabitur dolor pharetra idin elit commodo tincidunt nunc proin feugiat consequat turpis vehicula urna sit amet phasellus lacinia tellus. enim diam euismod non pretium vel gravida nec leo donec semper metus auctor scelerisque sed est erat duis felis nec felis posuere tincidunt auctor risus hac habitasse platea dictumst curabitur dolor pharetra idin elit commodo tincidunt nunc proin feugiat consequat turpis vehicula urna sit amet phasellus lacinia tellus sit amet laoreet contetur felis posuere tincidunt auctor risus hac habitasse platea dictumst curabitur dolor pharetra idin elit commodo tincidunt nunc proin feugiat consequat turpis vehicula urna sit amet phasellus lacinia tellus demino americo anfection cidunt nunc proin.[/vc_column_text][mk_blockquote font_family="Georgia, serif" font_type="safefont"]Commodo tincidunt nunc proin feugiat consequat turpis vehicula urna sit amet phasellus lacinia tellus sit amet laoreet conte[/mk_blockquote][vc_column_text]habitasse platea dictumst curabitur dolor pharetra idin elit commodo tincidunt nunc proin feugiat consequat turpis vehicula urna sit amet phasellus lacinia tellus sit amet laoreet contetur felis posuere tincidunt auctor risus hac habitasse platea dictumst curabitur dolor pharetra idin elit commodo tincidunt nunc proin feugiat consequat turpis vehicula urna sit amet phasellus lacinia tellus demino americo.[/vc_column_text][mk_padding_divider size="30"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=".vc_custom_1452157965979{background-image: url(http://demos.artbees.net/jupiter5/helike/wp-content/uploads/sites/72/2015/11/why-we-offer-bg.jpg?id=256) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}"][vc_column][mk_padding_divider size="73"][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" size="31" font_weight="300" txt_transform="uppercase" letter_spacing="2" margin_bottom="0" font_family="none" align="center"]reasons to choose[/mk_fancy_title][mk_divider style="thin_solid" divider_width="custom_width" custom_width="34" thin_single_color="#fda600" thickness="4" margin_top="0" margin_bottom="60"][vc_row_inner is_fullwidth_content="false"][vc_column_inner width="1/3"][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" font_weight="bold" txt_transform="uppercase" letter_spacing="1" margin_bottom="0" font_family="none"][mk_font_icons icon="mk-moon-checkmark" color="#fda600" size="small" padding_horizental="0" padding_vertical="0" circle="false" circle_color="" align="none" link=""] quickest cargo[/mk_fancy_title][vc_column_text]Commodo tincidunt nunc proin urna sit amet[/vc_column_text][mk_padding_divider size="small" padding_horizental="0" padding_vertical="0" circle="false" circle_color="" align="none" link=""] experienced staff[/mk_fancy_title][vc_column_text]Commodo tincidunt nunc proin urna sit amet[/vc_column_text][mk_padding_divider size="20" visibility="visible-sm"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/3"][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" font_weight="bold" txt_transform="uppercase" align="none" link=""] big stock[/mk_fancy_title][vc_column_text]Commodo tincidunt nunc proin urna sit amet[/vc_column_text][mk_padding_divider size="30"][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" amet[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/3"][mk_image src="http://demos.artbees.net/jupiter5/helike/wp-content/uploads/sites/72/2015/11/cargo.jpg" image_size="full" link="#" size="60"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" size="31" font_weight="300" letter_spacing="1" margin_bottom="0" font_family="none" align="center"]GLOBAL item.title: Fleet
item.dc:creator: cuneyt
item.content:encoded: [vc_row animation="bottom-to-top" css=".vc_custom_1452159311313{padding-top: 140px !important;padding-bottom: 10px !important;padding-left: 5px !important;background-image: url(http://demos.artbees.net/jupiter5/helike/wp-content/uploads/sites/72/2015/11/fleet-bg.jpg?id=283) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}"][vc_column][mk_title_box color="#433d60" highlight_color="#ffffff" highlight_opacity="1" size="60" font_weight="300" letter_spacing="2" font_family="none" animation="bottom-to-top"]FLEET[/mk_title_box][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][mk_portfolio style="masonry" hover_scenarios="light-zoomin" image_size="full" count="9" sortable_align="center" order="ASC"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][mk_padding_divider size="55"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" size="31" font_weight="300" letter_spacing="1" margin_bottom="0" font_family="none" align="center"]GLOBAL PARTNERS[/mk_fancy_title][mk_divider style="thin_solid" divider_width="custom_width" custom_width="34" thin_single_color="#fda600" thickness="4" margin_top="0"][mk_clients count="8" height="70" margin_bottom="0"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row fullwidth="true" fullwidth_content="false" css=".vc_custom_1448620054051{background-color: #ffc453 !important;}"][vc_column width="5/6"][mk_fancy_title color="#433d60" size="23" font_weight="400" margin_top="35" font_family="Open+Sans" font_type="google"]Have Questions? Contact Our Manager For Details[/mk_fancy_title][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/6"][mk_padding_divider size="25" visibility="hidden-sm"][mk_button dimension="flat" size="large" url="#" align="right" margin_bottom="0" bg_color="#433d60" btn_hover_bg="#ffffff" btn_hover_txt_color="#433d60"]CALL NOW![/mk_button][mk_padding_divider size="30" visibility="visible-sm"][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Portfolio-01
item.dc:creator: alex
item.content:encoded: [vc_row][vc_column][mk_padding_divider][vc_column_text]Proin a semper felis phasellus porttitor fermentum dolor non viverra aenean placerat velit in consectetur viverra nisl urna molestie tellus at iaculis leo tellus nec est proin finibus tincidunt risus ac porttitor praesent facilisis tortor venenatis dolor congue at pharetra odio gravida nteger pulvinar estnon ex bibendum luctus nulla fermentum odio ac iaculis tempus iulla at eros vel augue porta tempus donec ante eros imperdiet eget eros vitae mollis varius nisl donec mi nisl elementum nulla quis justo lacinia quis consectetur orci blandi etiam cursus blandit elit imperdiet finibus pellentesque id leo suscipit aliquam dolor vitae lacinia dui aliquam posuere egestas mattis pellent esque vel viverra lorem.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Sed sagittis purus vel semper vulputate integer laoreet enim lacus sed convallis mauris ultricies in sed interdum metus id orci gravida sit amet convallis erat cursus donec iaculis mollis nisi sit amet consequat maecenas in urna lacus duis id vulputate turpis nunc risus metus suscipit sed ultrices id placerat ac enim donec eleifend nisi vitae suscipit tempus sapien lorem posuere sem ac pulvinar justo nisl quis neque donec mollis.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Portfolio-02
item.dc:creator: alex
item.content:encoded: [vc_row][vc_column][mk_padding_divider][vc_column_text]Proin a semper felis phasellus porttitor fermentum dolor non viverra aenean placerat velit in consectetur viverra nisl urna molestie tellus at iaculis leo tellus nec est proin finibus tincidunt risus ac porttitor praesent facilisis tortor venenatis dolor congue at pharetra odio gravida nteger pulvinar estnon ex bibendum luctus nulla fermentum odio ac iaculis tempus iulla at eros vel augue porta tempus donec ante eros imperdiet eget eros vitae mollis varius nisl donec mi nisl elementum nulla quis justo lacinia quis consectetur orci blandi etiam cursus blandit elit imperdiet finibus pellentesque id leo suscipit aliquam dolor vitae lacinia dui aliquam posuere egestas mattis pellent esque vel viverra lorem.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]Sed sagittis purus vel semper vulputate integer laoreet enim lacus sed convallis mauris ultricies in sed interdum metus id orci gravida sit amet convallis erat cursus donec iaculis mollis nisi sit amet consequat maecenas in urna lacus duis id vulputate turpis nunc risus metus suscipit sed ultrices id placerat ac enim donec eleifend nisi vitae suscipit tempus sapien lorem posuere sem ac pulvinar justo nisl quis neque donec mollis.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

Amedee 4401 Waldeck Street Grapevine Nashville, TX 76051[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/4"][mk_font_icons icon="mk-moon-phone" color="#fda600" size="xx-large" margin_horizental="6"
